items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan has won five of his seven UFC fights by knockout.
items.quote: I think he's won seven fights in the UFC, five of them by knockout.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier is unable to keep up with Christian Leroy Duncan's speed and movement.
items.quote: But I just don't think he's going to be able to keep up with this guy.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has been dropped in every one of his UFC appearances.
items.quote: Mitch Ramirez has been dropped every time he's seen any kind of UFC canvas

items.claim: Chase Hooper is not yet in his fighting prime.
items.quote: I still think he's like two to three years from his prime. Not having anything to do with age, but more just performance.

items.claim: Tabitha Ricci has a 37% striking accuracy, which is the lowest on the card.
items.quote: Tabitha Reichi has by far the worst striking accuracy on the card down to 37%

items.claim: Tabitha Ricci has a negative striking differential.
items.quote: being at a negative striking differential as well

items.claim: Fatima Klein has developed her Muay Thai to a level that complements her grappling.
items.quote: I think Fatima Klein's Muay Thai has really caught up with the grappling in pretty short time.
